hero.title: Our Services
hero.description: Comprehensive therapeutic solutions designed to address your specific rehabilitation needs and restore optimal physical function.

services.title: Clinical Physical Therapy
services.description: Evidence-based therapeutic exercises and manual therapy tailored to your condition. Our expert therapists use proven techniques to restore mobility and reduce pain.

services.title: Sports Injury Rehabilitation
services.description: Specialized recovery protocols for athletic injuries and performance restoration. Get back to peak physical condition with sport-specific training.

services.title: Post-Surgical Recovery
services.description: Comprehensive rehabilitation following orthopedic and general surgical procedures. Accelerate your healing with guided therapeutic protocols.

services.title: Cardiac & Respiratory Therapy
services.description: Specialized programs for cardiovascular and pulmonary rehabilitation. Improve heart health and breathing capacity with supervised therapy.

services.title: Traditional Cupping Therapy
services.description: Ancient therapeutic technique for muscle tension and pain relief. Enhance circulation and promote natural healing.

services.title: Medical Nutrition Counseling
services.description: Nutritional guidance supporting optimal recovery and overall wellness. Personalized diet plans to complement your therapy.
